metadata.description: Ray Fernando's collection of installable Skill files for AI coding agents.

plugins.name: running-bug-review-board
plugins.description: Real-user QA and Bug Review Board workflow for web and iOS/iPadOS app repos. Files P0/P1/P2 bug reports, produces YES/NO phase sign-off, generates an editorial HTML QA dashboard, syncs with confirmed issue trackers, and supports a separate Interactive BRB triage flow.

plugins.name: parallel-orchestrate
plugins.description: Orchestrator-worker skill for Cursor: decompose a big task into independent slices, fan them out to parallel subagents with the Task tool (Multitask Mode), verify each handoff, and synthesize one deliverable. For large research, analysis, audits, and codebase or data exploration.

plugins.name: parallel-orchestrate-codex
plugins.description: Orchestrator-worker skill for Codex: decompose a big task into independent slices, spawn parallel Codex subagents (or spawn_agents_on_csv), verify evidence-backed handoffs, and synthesize one deliverable. Tuned for Codex roles, config.toml limits, and codex exec fleets.

plugins.name: bootstrap-ios
plugins.description: Meta-skill for iOS and macOS app agents: load the right Swift, SwiftUI, testing, data, build, simulator, and XcodeBuildMCP guidance before touching an Apple-platform repo.
